sections.name: Navigation Bar
sections.description: Top navigation with logo and links.

sections.name: SEO & Structured Data
sections.description: Meta tags, social sharing image, JSON-LD structured data.

title.aiHint: Concise page title under 60 chars: property type + location + key feature

description.aiHint: Compelling summary 120-155 chars with price and top amenities

keywords.aiHint: 5-8 keywords: property type, location, unique features, price segment

imageAlt.description: Alt text for the social sharing image

language.aiHint: ISO 639-1 language code (e.g. en, hi, ar)

canonicalUrl.description: Canonical URL — injected at deploy time

metaPixelId.description: Meta (Facebook) Pixel ID — numeric ID only, e.g. 1234567890123

googleAdsId.description: Google Ads Measurement ID — e.g. AW-123456789

propertyType.aiHint: e.g. Apartment, Villa, Penthouse, Studio, Townhouse

description.aiHint: Detailed property description for structured data

currency.aiHint: ISO 4217 currency code: INR, AED, USD, SGD, etc.

country.aiHint: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code: IN, AE, US, SG, etc.

data.title: The Heights Country Club & Wellness | Emaar
data.description: Discover The Heights Country Club & Wellness — an exclusive sanctuary of refined living by Emaar, where green landscapes form a vibrant and sustainable community.
data.imageAlt: Aerial view of The Heights Country Club & Wellness by Emaar

structuredData.description: An exclusive sanctuary of refined living by Emaar, where green landscapes form a vibrant and sustainable community.

sections.name: Hero Section
sections.description: Full-screen hero with headline, subtext, and background media.

overlayEnabled.description: Dark overlay on hero background for text readability

data.headline: A Sanctuary of
data.subtext: Envisioned as an exclusive retreat lifestyle, where green landscapes come together to form a vibrant and sustainable community.

sections.name: Introduction
sections.description: Two-column vision statement with eyebrow, heading, and body text.

data.heading: Nature-led living, elevated to an art form.
data.body: The masterplan weaves meandering pathways, lush green spaces, tranquil courtyards, and cascading water features into a harmonious environment that inspires movement, calm, and connection with the outdoors. Integrated nature trails, fitness areas, and meditation spaces support a holistic way of life, designed for those who seek the extraordinary.

sections.name: Media Showcase
sections.description: Full-width virtual tour section supporting image, video, or iframe embed.

sections.name: Pricing
sections.description: Pricing section with a lead-capture modal gate to reveal the property price.

submissionEndpoint.description: System Injected — Supabase Edge Function URL

data.heading: Pricing & Floor Plans
data.subtext: Register your interest to receive exclusive access to our detailed pricing, payment plans, and comprehensive floor layouts for all property types.
data.successNote: Our private advisory team has received your request and will contact you shortly with the full brochure and tailored payment plans.
data.modalSubtext: Provide your details to instantly reveal exclusive pricing, payment plans, and comprehensive floor layouts.

sections.name: Project Brochure
sections.description: Split-screen section with an image on one side and a brochure download CTA on the other.

data.heading: Project Brochure
data.body: Download our comprehensive brochure to explore the masterplan, architectural details, amenities, and lifestyle offerings in exquisite detail.

sections.name: Amenities
sections.description: Editorial image grid showcasing world-class amenities.

data.heading: World-Class Amenities
data.subtext: Every detail, from tranquil pathways to vibrant social spaces, is thoughtfully designed to nurture both body and mind.

items.title: Private Beach
items.description: Exclusive access to pristine white sands.

sections.name: Testimonials

items.name: Sarah Mitchell
items.text: The attention to detail and quality of finishes exceeded all expectations. This is truly luxury living at its finest.

items.name: James Chen
items.text: From the first viewing to move-in, the entire experience was seamless. The team's professionalism is unmatched.
